title: Kingfisher Window Bird Feeder, Transparent, BON-BFWINDOW
features: • Size: height 15 x width 15 x depth 6.5 cm
description: Product Description Manufactured from the house of Kingfisher, operates over 1,100 stores and growing omni channel operations across 10 countries in Europe. Following an in-depth review of Kingfisher's businesses alongside in-depth studies of our customers' home improvement needs, the leadership team announced the 'one' Kingfisher plan. This plan will leverage the scale of the business by creating a unified company, where customer needs always come first. Safety Warning Secure feeder properly to prevent damage to windows. Use feeder responsibly to avoid harming wildlife. Do not overfeed, and avoid using food that may be harmful to certain bird species. Box Contains 1 x Window Bird Feeder See more
